name: Ginza Renoir Co., Ltd.
summary: Ginza Renoir Co., Ltd. manages and franchises a chain of restaurants in Japan. It operates restaurants under the Tea room Renoir, Cafe Renoir, Cafe Miyama, NEW YORKER'S Cafe, New Style !!, NEW YORKER'S Cafe, Ruyuno Coffee, My Space & Plaza, Miyama coffee, and BLENZ COFFEE brands. The company was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
